description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script on the default runner image to update apt, install apt-transport-https, add the Crystal GPG key from keys.gnupg.net, add the Crystal apt repository, update again, install the crystal compiler, and rename src/config_base.yml to src/config.yml. Define a single default stage with a build job that runs make. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are specified.
